work.summary: Core contributor of Cigna's redesign codebase. Developed web components and apps from UI mockups. Researched technical blockers and presented findings to scrum teams. Collaborated with stakeholders to align development with accessibility and design objectives.

details.text: Developed an ADA, WCAG compliant form library using Lit, TypeScript, and Sass.
Researched and proposed a new microservice architecture. Prototyped a demo modifying Webpack and Module Federation to support environment requirements.
Mentored junior developers in framework methodologies and helped troubleshoot issues.
Automated claim data entry process by developing an online supplemental claim form.
Developed and integrated a custom AWS Lambda API with our software to support search indexing for two sites and upgraded six sites' search pages using JavaScript and Sass.
Refactored department’s file search app from Perl to Node.js to improve code maintainability.
Oversaw strategic direction, managed budgets, and conducted interviews for social leadership positions across 6 domestic and international sites for the Technology Early Career Program (TECDP).
Managed department’s website migration. Developed filtering tools, designed pages, and collaborated with teams to reach agreements on content management strategies.
Liaison for Incident Response teams. Triaged software issues to prevent disruptions to critical resolution processes.
Resolved over 2,000 emails in 7 months for conferencing software upgrades. Coordinated 80 support meetings and hosted 15 training sessions for hundreds of employees.
Organized over 30 events giving colleagues networking opportunities with peers, mentors, and leadership for TECDP.

work.summary: Analyzed power requirements and managed data center hardware deployments for contractors. Discovered and documented methods to use inventory management software more efficiently.

details.text: Won first place with team members on the TECDP Internship Project. Presented a proof-of-concept mental health app.
